Document: # Picking Up The Pieces (2823-2828) After the war, the sector entered an era of restoration after a brief period of silence. The once called CDF, finally rebranded themselves as the current [color=#FFD580]Triad Defense Force (TDF)[/color] and decided to establish their presence as the sector's guardian, maintaining its law and order. The remnants of the war can still be seen from the derelicts scattered all around the sector; leftover techs and threats of the two factions such as Solarian rogue AIs and Coalition biological weapons were scattered all over the sector as the TDF rebuilds the sector one step at a time.
